name: Snowline Gold Corp.
description: Snowline Gold Corp. is a Yukon-based gold exploration company with a focus on the discovery and development of high-grade, district-scale gold systems. The company holds an extensive portfolio of projects totaling over 333,000 hectares within the prolific Selwyn Basin. Its flagship Rogue Project features the Valley discovery, a significant reduced intrusion-related gold system (RIRGS) with high-grade, bulk-tonnage potential. Snowline is committed to responsible exploration and creating value through systematic geological analysis and strategic land positioning in one of the world's premier mining jurisdictions.
